title: 3D gizmo for repositioning the POI marker
capture_instructions: Close-up view of the POI marker with the 3D transform gizmo clearly visible. Camera is orbited to a 3/4 perspective angle so all three axis arrows (X=red, Y=green, Z=blue) and the plane handles are visible. The gizmo should fill roughly the center of the frame. No drag in progress — idle gizmo state.
ui_state: POI placed and gizmo active, camera at 3/4 perspective, zoomed in on marker

annotations.label: Red axis arrow (X — drag to constrain movement)
Plane handles area (corner squares for 2-axis movement)
